    1. getUnitClass()

Interface HaveClass

All Known Implementing Classes:
Akali, Bard, Braum, Caitlyn, Darius, Ezreal, Fiora, Garen, HeroCard, Jinx, LeaderCard, Nautilus, Neeko, Olaf, Ornn, Ryze, Shaco, Soraka, TahmKench, Talon, Teemo, Veigar, Volibear, Zed, Zilean, Zoe
public interface HaveClass
An interface for entities that possess a specific unit class. Implementing this interface ensures that the entity (such as a Hero or Leader) can be categorized and interact with class-specific mechanics in the game.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    UnitClass
    getUnitClass()
    Gets the unit class of the entity.
    void
    setUnitClass(UnitClass unitClass)
    Sets or updates the unit class of the entity.

  • Method Details

    • getUnitClass

      UnitClass getUnitClass()
      Gets the unit class of the entity.
      Returns:
      The current UnitClass assigned to this entity.

    • setUnitClass

      void setUnitClass(UnitClass unitClass)
      Sets or updates the unit class of the entity.
      Parameters:
      unitClass - The new UnitClass to assign.
